entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species Pennisetum americanum targeted for population improvement.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The international research center conducting the population improvement programme.

entities.name: HALF-SIB SELECTION
entities.description: A resource-efficient selection method used on less important composites.

entities.name: S1 SELECTION
entities.description: A selection method employing two-stage progeny testing.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand pathogens.

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen targeted for resistance in pearl millet.

entities.name: TOLYPOSPORIUM PENICILLARIAE
entities.description: A fungal pathogen targeted for resistance in pearl millet.

entities.name: RECIPROCAL RECURRENT SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method carried out in pairs of populations to improve performance.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity measure of the derived varieties.

entities.name: INBREEDING DEPRESSION
entities.description: The reduction in vigor or productivity resulting from inbreeding in varieties.

entities.name: COMPOSITE BULKS
entities.description: Populations from which varieties are derived.

entities.name: VARIETIES
entities.description: The final plant lines developed from composite bulks through selection.
